q: Apart from energy resources getting depleted, energy harnessing and utilization cause an immense amount of:
Environmental problems directly related to energy production and consumption include air pollution, climate change, water pollution, thermal pollution, and:
The problems that relate to the use of fossil fuels include global warming, acid rains, dangers posed by leaded fuels, oil spills, gas leaks and explosions, air pollution and:
a: water pollution caused by poorly managed coal mines
